name: theaisingularity-research
description: Local-first research agents from TheAiSingularity. Currently ships the `agentic-research` plugin (8-node pipeline with CoVe verification, 6 domain presets, bring-your-own-docs).

plugins.name: agentic-research
plugins.description: Research agent that verifies its own answers with full source citations, optional local corpus, and zero cloud dependency. Runs on Gemma 3 4B via Ollama or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
